languages.text: "Обратись к служителям Экклезиархии и сделай как они скажут".
"Seek out the servants of the Ecclesiarchy and do as they instruct."
languages.original_text: "Обратись к служителям Экклезиархии и сделай как они скажут".

traits.locale_text: "Seek out the servants of the Ecclesiarchy and do as they say."
"Seek out the servants of the Ecclesiarchy and do as they instruct."
"Heed the missionaries of the Ecclesiarchy and renounce your superstitions."
"Seek out the servants of the Ecclesiarchy and do as they say."
"Seek out the servants of the Ecclesiarchy and do as they instruct."

languages.text: 「教会の宣教師に耳を傾け、迷信を捨てなさい」
languages.original_text: "Heed the missionaries of the Ecclesiarchy and renounce your superstitions."

languages.text: "Ekleşiarşi hizmetkârlarını bulun ve onların dediklerini yapın."
languages.original_text: "Seek out the servants of the Ecclesiarchy and do as they instruct."

traits.locale_text: "Ekleşiarşi hizmetkârlarını bulun ve onların dediklerini yapın."

languages.text: “去找国教的仆从，按他们的指示去做。”
languages.original_text: "Seek out the servants of the Ecclesiarchy and do as they instruct."

traits.locale_text: “去找国教的仆从，按他们的指示去做。”

languages.text: "Sucht die Diener der Ekklesiarchie auf und folgt ihren Anweisungen."
languages.original_text: "Seek out the servants of the Ecclesiarchy and do as they instruct."

traits.locale_text: "Sucht die Diener der Ekklesiarchie auf und folgt ihren Anweisungen."

languages.text: « Cherchez les missionnaires de l'Ecclésiarchie et obéissez-leur. »
languages.original_text: "Seek out the servants of the Ecclesiarchy and do as they instruct."

traits.locale_text: « Cherchez les missionnaires de l'Ecclésiarchie et obéissez-leur. »

languages.text: «Busque a los sirvientes de la Eclesiarquía y haga lo que ordenen».
languages.original_text: "Seek out the servants of the Ecclesiarchy and do as they instruct."

traits.locale_text: «Busque a los sirvientes de la Eclesiarquía y haga lo que ordenen».
